history.content:
<thought>
The goal (G) is visible at row 05 column F. My current position is at row 07 column D facing forward toward row 06 column D, which is a lava cell (L), so moving forward is unsafe. To reach the goal, I need to turn to face either right or left to go around the lava. Looking left is a wall (#), so I cannot turn left. Turning right should face me toward row 07 column E, which is an empty cell (.). I will turn right then move forward in the next steps.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right at row 07 column E, which is a floor cell (.). I can move forward safely into this cell to continue navigating towards the goal at row 05 column B. Moving forward will put me closer and potentially allow me to plan a route around the lava cells.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 07 column E facing right. The cell in front of me (row 07 column F) is unknown, but the immediate left cell (row 07 column D) is free. However, I want to reach the goal at row 06 column B, which is to my left and slightly ahead. I should turn left to face row 07 column D to move closer to the goal area avoiding the lava (L) cell at row 06 column C.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing up. The path ahead (row 06 column D) is floor (.), which is safe. The goal is at row 05 column E. Therefore, moving forward will bring me closer to the goal while avoiding lava cells present on adjacent spaces. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 06 column D facing up. The goal is at row 06 column E, which is to my right. Moving forward leads to row 05 column D which is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. Instead, I should turn right to face the goal cell and then move forward towards it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column D facing right. The cell in front of me (row 06 column E) is floor (.), which is safe to move into. The goal is at row 06 column C to my left, but the path to it is blocked by lava and walls. The immediate safe action is to move forward towards the floor cell and then reassess the situation to plan a safe approach to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
